# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure Self-Hosted Runner Build and Deploy Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - 'release/**'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read

env:
  BUILD_TIMEOUT_MINUTES: 30
  DEPLOY_TIMEOUT_MINUTES: 15
  ALLOWED_BUILD_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/build
  ALLOWED_DEPLOY_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/deploy
  ARTIFACT_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/artifacts

jobs:
  validate:
    name: Validate Build and Deploy Scripts
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    timeout-minutes: 5
    outputs:
      build_script_valid: ${{ steps.validate_build.outputs.valid }}
      deploy_script_valid: ${{ steps.validate_deploy.outputs.valid }}
      build_script_hash: ${{ steps.hash_scripts.outputs.build_hash }}
      deploy_script_hash: ${{ steps.hash_scripts.outputs.deploy_hash }}
    steps:
      - name: Clean workspace before checkout
        run: |
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/*
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/.[!.]*

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Validate build script exists and is safe
        id: validate_build
        run: |
          BUILD_SCRIPT="./scripts/build.sh"

          if [ ! -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build script not found at $BUILD_SCRIPT"
            echo "valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            exit 1
          fi

          # Ensure the script is a regular file, not a symlink pointing outside repo
          REAL_PATH=$(realpath "$BUILD_SCRIPT")
          WORKSPACE_REAL=$(realpath "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE")
          if [[ "$REAL_PATH" != "$WORKSPACE_REAL"/* ]]; then
            echo "::error::Build script symlink points outside workspace"
            echo "valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            exit 1
          fi

          # Check for dangerous patterns - command injection vectors
          DANGEROUS_PATTERNS=(
            'curl.*|.*sh'
            'wget.*|.*sh'
            'curl.*|.*bash'
            'wget.*|.*bash'
            'eval.*\$\{'
            'eval.*\$\('
            '\bsudo\b'
            'chmod.*\+s'
            '/etc/passwd'
            '/etc/shadow'
            'mkfifo'
            '\bnc\b.*-[el]'
            '\bncat\b'
            'reverse.*shell'
            '>(\/dev\/tcp|\/dev\/udp)'
            '\brm\b.*-[rR]f\s+\/'
            'dd\s+if=.*of=\/dev'
            'cryptominer'
            'xmrig'
          )

          for pattern in "${DANGEROUS_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
            if grep -qPi "$pattern" "$BUILD_SCRIPT"; then
              echo "::error::Build script contains dangerous pattern: $pattern"
              echo "valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              exit 1
            fi
          done

          echo "valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Build script validation passed"

      - name: Validate deploy script exists and is safe
        id: validate_deploy
        run: |
          DEPLOY_SCRIPT="./scripts/deploy.sh"

          if [ ! -f "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
            echo "::error::Deploy script not found at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
            echo "valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            exit 1
          fi

          REAL_PATH=$(realpath "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT")
          WORKSPACE_REAL=$(realpath "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE")
          if [[ "$REAL_PATH" != "$WORKSPACE_REAL"/* ]]; then
            echo "::error::Deploy script symlink points outside workspace"
            echo "valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            exit 1
          fi

          DANGEROUS_PATTERNS=(
            'curl.*|.*sh'
            'wget.*|.*sh'
            'curl.*|.*bash'
            'wget.*|.*bash'
            'eval.*\$\{'
            'eval.*\$\('
            '\bsudo\b'
            'chmod.*\+s'
            '/etc/passwd'
            '/etc/shadow'
            'mkfifo'
            '\bnc\b.*-[el]'
            '\bncat\b'
            'reverse.*shell'
            '>(\/dev\/tcp|\/dev\/udp)'
            '\brm\b.*-[rR]f\s+\/'
            'dd\s+if=.*of=\/dev'
          )

          for pattern in "${DANGEROUS_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
            if grep -qPi "$pattern" "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"; then
              echo "::error::Deploy script contains dangerous pattern: $pattern"
              echo "valid=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
              exit 1
            fi
          done

          echo "valid=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Deploy script validation passed"

      - name: Compute script hashes for integrity verification
        id: hash_scripts
        run: |
          BUILD_HASH=$(sha256sum ./scripts/build.sh | awk '{print $1}')
          DEPLOY_HASH=$(sha256sum ./scripts/deploy.sh | awk '{print $1}')
          echo "build_hash=$BUILD_HASH" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "deploy_hash=$DEPLOY_HASH" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Build script SHA256: $BUILD_HASH"
          echo "Deploy script SHA256: $DEPLOY_HASH"

  build:
    name: Execute Build
    needs: validate
    if: needs.validate.outputs.build_script_valid == 'true'
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    timeout-minutes: 30
    env:
      CI: true
      NODE_ENV: production
    steps:
      - name: Clean workspace before checkout
        run: |
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/*
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/.[!.]*

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Verify build script integrity
        run: |
          CURRENT_HASH=$(sha256sum ./scripts/build.sh | awk '{print $1}')
          EXPECTED_HASH="${{ needs.validate.outputs.build_script_hash }}"
          if [ "$CURRENT_HASH" != "$EXPECTED_HASH" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build script integrity check failed. Expected: $EXPECTED_HASH, Got: $CURRENT_HASH"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Build script integrity verified"

      - name: Prepare isolated build environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p "$ALLOWED_BUILD_DIR"
          mkdir -p "$ARTIFACT_DIR"

          # Copy source to build directory to contain file operations
          rsync -a --exclude='.git' "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/" "$ALLOWED_BUILD_DIR/" || true

      - name: Execute build script in restricted context
        working-directory: ${{ env.ALLOWED_BUILD_DIR }}
        run: |
          # Restrict file creation to build directory via umask
          umask 0022

          # Set resource limits to prevent runaway processes
          ulimit -f 1048576  # Max file size: 512MB in 512-byte blocks
          ulimit -u 256      # Max user processes
          ulimit -v 4194304  # Max virtual memory: 4GB in KB
          ulimit -t 1800     # Max CPU time: 30 minutes

          # Execute the build script with restricted PATH
          export PATH="/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"
          export HOME="$ALLOWED_BUILD_DIR"
          export TMPDIR="$ALLOWED_BUILD_DIR/tmp"
          mkdir -p "$TMPDIR"

          # Prevent network-based exfiltration of secrets by unsetting sensitive vars
          unset ACTIONS_RUNTIME_TOKEN
          unset ACTIONS_CACHE_URL
          unset GITHUB_TOKEN

          chmod +x "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/scripts/build.sh"
          bash "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/scripts/build.sh"
        env:
          BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_DIR }}
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ""

      - name: Scan build artifacts for sensitive data
        run: |
          echo "Scanning artifacts for accidentally included secrets..."

          if [ -d "$ARTIFACT_DIR" ] && [ "$(ls -A "$ARTIFACT_DIR" 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
            # Check for common secret patterns in artifacts
            SECRET_PATTERNS=(
              'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}'           # AWS Access Key
              'ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}'        # GitHub PAT
              'glpat-[a-zA-Z0-9\-]{20}'    # GitLab PAT
              '-----BEGIN.*PRIVATE KEY-----' # Private keys
              'sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{48}'         # OpenAI API key
              'xox[bpras]-[a-zA-Z0-9\-]+'  # Slack tokens
            )

            FOUND_SECRETS=false
            for pattern in "${SECRET_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
              if grep -rPlI "$pattern" "$ARTIFACT_DIR/" 2>/dev/null; then
                echo "::error::Potential secret found matching pattern: $pattern"
                FOUND_SECRETS=true
              fi
            done

            if [ "$FOUND_SECRETS" = true ]; then
              echo "::error::Build artifacts contain potential secrets. Failing build."
              exit 1
            fi

            echo "Artifact scan passed - no secrets detected"
          else
            echo "No artifacts to scan"
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: success()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.sha }}
          path: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_DIR }}/
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Clean up build environment
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -rf "$ALLOWED_BUILD_DIR"
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/tmp"
          # Clean any Docker artifacts if Docker was used
          docker system prune -f --filter "label=ci-build=${{ github.run_id }}" 2>/dev/null || true

  deploy:
    name: Execute Deployment
    needs: [validate, build]
    if: |
      needs.validate.outputs.deploy_script_valid == 'true' &&
      needs.build.result == 'success' &&
      github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' &&
      github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    timeout-minutes: 15
    environment:
      name: production
      url: ${{ steps.deploy_output.outputs.deploy_url }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-production
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Clean workspace before checkout
        run: |
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/*
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/.[!.]*

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Verify deploy script integrity
        run: |
          CURRENT_HASH=$(sha256sum ./scripts/deploy.sh | awk '{print $1}')
          EXPECTED_HASH="${{ needs.validate.outputs.deploy_script_hash }}"
          if [ "$CURRENT_HASH" != "$EXPECTED_HASH" ]; then
            echo "::error::Deploy script integrity check failed. Expected: $EXPECTED_HASH, Got: $CURRENT_HASH"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Deploy script integrity verified"

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.sha }}
          path: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_DIR }}

      - name: Prepare deployment environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p "$ALLOWED_DEPLOY_DIR"

      - name: Execute deploy script in restricted context
        id: deploy_output
        working-directory: ${{ env.ALLOWED_DEPLOY_DIR }}
        run: |
          umask 0022

          # Set resource limits
          ulimit -u 128
          ulimit -t 900  # 15 minutes max CPU

          export PATH="/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"
          export HOME="$ALLOWED_DEPLOY_DIR"
          export TMPDIR="$ALLOWED_DEPLOY_DIR/tmp"
          mkdir -p "$TMPDIR"

          # Remove CI tokens from environment to prevent exfiltration
          unset ACTIONS_RUNTIME_TOKEN
          unset ACTIONS_CACHE_URL

          chmod +x "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/scripts/deploy.sh"
          bash "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/scripts/deploy.sh"

          # Capture deploy URL if script outputs it
          if [ -f "$ALLOWED_DEPLOY_DIR/deploy_url.txt" ]; then
            DEPLOY_URL=$(head -1 "$ALLOWED_DEPLOY_DIR/deploy_url.txt")
            # Validate URL format before setting output
            if [[ "$DEPLOY_URL" =~ ^https?://[a-zA-Z0-9._/-]+$ ]]; then
              echo "deploy_url=$DEPLOY_URL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            fi
          fi
        env:
          DEPLOY_ARTIFACTS_DIR: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_DIR }}
          DEPLOY_COMMIT_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
          DEPLOY_REF: ${{ github.ref }}
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ""

      - name: Clean up deployment environment
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -rf "$ALLOWED_DEPLOY_DIR"
          rm -rf "$ARTIFACT_DIR"
          # Ensure no lingering processes from deployment
          pkill -f "deploy.sh" 2>/dev/null || true

  cleanup:
    name: Post-Pipeline Cleanup
    needs: [build, deploy]
    if: always()
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, datacenter]
    timeout-minutes: 5
    steps:
      - name: Full workspace cleanup
        run: |
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/*
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/.[!.]*

          # Clean temporary files older than 1 hour that may have been left by previous runs
          find /tmp -maxdepth 1 -user "$(whoami)" -mmin +60 -delete 2>/dev/null || true

          # Prune unused Docker resources from this runner
          docker system prune -f --filter "until=1h" 2>/dev/null || true

          echo "Cleanup completed for run ${{ github.run_id }}"
